title: Phone pocket is a game changer
review_text: Zippered back pocket fits my iPhone perfectly. No bouncing. Built-in liner is comfortable. These are my go-to for every run now.

title: Wish they made 5 inch
review_text: Great shorts but I prefer a shorter inseam. The 7 inch hits below my knee which is a bit long for my taste. Fabric and pockets are excellent though.
